name: Data Classification Assistant
description: Helps users apply the correct sensitivity label and helps compliance admins assess label coverage. Ask me which label to use, what a label does, or which sites need better labeling.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Which sensitivity label should I use for a document with salary data?
What does the 'Highly Confidential' label actually do?
Show me the top 10 SharePoint sites with the lowest label coverage
